marketingFooter.tagline: Governance, Risk, and Compliance — grounded, cited, and audit-ready.

hero.title: Compliance work your auditors will trust
hero.description: Rasheed helps Governance, Risk, Compliance, Privacy, and Legal teams author, map, and monitor controls across every framework you answer to — grounded in your own evidence, reviewed by your people.

trustedBy.label: Built to help organizations of every size manage governance, risk, and compliance clearly and efficiently

why.title: Manual compliance work doesn't scale — and it doesn't hold up under audit
why.description: Spreadsheets and disconnected evidence make every audit a scramble. Rasheed grounds every answer in your own documents and keeps a human decision behind every consequential change — so your posture is always current, and always defensible.

controlMapping.title: Control mapping across frameworks
controlMapping.description: Map evidence and controls once, and see coverage across every framework you're held to — no duplicate work per regulator.

groundedAnswers.title: Grounded, cited answers
groundedAnswers.description: Every compliance claim traces back to your own documents and the framework text — no uncited guesses on matters that matter.

governedMissions.title: Governed missions, not chat
governedMissions.description: Gap analyses, evidence collection, and reporting run as trackable missions with a full audit trail, not a scrolling transcript.

riskRegister.title: Risk register with real workflow
riskRegister.description: Score, mitigate, and accept risk with human sign-off gates — risk acceptance always requires a qualified person's approval.

askPosture.title: Ask your compliance posture
askPosture.description: Ask plain-language questions and get answers grounded in your evidence, with sources you can open and verify.

auditReporting.title: Audit-ready reporting
auditReporting.description: Generate executive, compliance, and risk reports on demand, exportable for auditors and leadership alike.

screenshots.title: See it, not just hear about it
screenshots.description: A real look at the workspace your team will use every day.
screenshots.dashboardCaption: Executive dashboard — compliance and risk posture at a glance
screenshots.analysisCaption: Document analysis — grounded findings, scored and cited

howItWorks.title: From documents to audit-ready posture in four steps

step1.title: Bring your policies and evidence
step1.description: Upload what you already have — nothing needs reformatting first.

step2.title: The platform reads and grounds them
step2.description: Documents are parsed and indexed against the frameworks you select.

step3.title: Review coverage, gaps, and risk
step3.description: Every number traces back to a source document.

step4.title: Act, approve, and report
step4.description: Close gaps and generate an audit-ready report with a clear sign-off trail.

frameworks.title: Built for the frameworks you're already held to
frameworks.description: Regional and international standards, mapped once and kept current.

humanDecides.title: A human always decides
humanDecides.description: The platform proposes, drafts, and analyzes — a qualified person on your team approves anything consequential, like a control sign-off or a risk acceptance.

q1.question: Does Rasheed replace our compliance team?
q1.answer: No. The platform is built as an assistant, not a replacement — it drafts, analyzes, and organizes work, but a qualified person on your team always reviews and approves anything consequential, like a policy publication or a risk acceptance.

q2.question: Where does the AI get its answers from?
q2.answer: Every answer is grounded in your own uploaded documents and the compliance framework text — never a general-purpose guess. If the platform doesn't have enough evidence to answer confidently, it tells you that instead of making something up.

q3.question: Is our data isolated from other organizations?
q3.answer: Yes. The platform is built multi-tenant from the ground up — every query, document, and AI retrieval is scoped strictly to your organization. Cross-tenant access isn't possible by design.

q4.question: How do we get started?
q4.answer: Sign in, upload a policy or piece of evidence, and select the frameworks you're measured against. Coverage, gaps, and grounded answers are available within minutes.

q5.question: Which document types can be analyzed?
q5.answer: Rasheed works with internal policies, procedures, risk registers, contracts, controls, evidence, and other governance and compliance documents.

q6.question: Does Rasheed support multiple frameworks and standards?
q6.answer: Yes — Rasheed helps align your policies and controls with frameworks and requirements such as ISO 27001, NCA ECC, PDPL, and other relevant standards.

cta.title: See your compliance posture clearly
cta.description: Start with your existing policies and evidence — Rasheed grounds every answer in what you already have.

ncaEcc.description: The National Cybersecurity Authority's baseline cybersecurity controls.

sama.description: Saudi Central Bank cybersecurity and compliance requirements for the financial sector.

pdpl.name: Personal Data Protection Law
pdpl.description: Saudi Arabia's personal data protection and privacy regulation.

iso27001.name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022
iso27001.description: The international standard for information security management systems.

nistCsf.name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework
nistCsf.description: A risk-based framework for managing cybersecurity outcomes.

cisControls.name: CIS Critical Security Controls
cisControls.description: Prioritized safeguards to mitigate the most common cyber attacks.

cobit.name: COBIT
cobit.description: Governance and management framework for enterprise IT.

coso.name: COSO Internal Control Framework
coso.description: Internal control and enterprise risk management framework.

hero.title: From assessment to more mature governance
hero.description: Rasheed helps organizations understand their governance, risk, and compliance readiness, analyze gaps, and organize improvement actions toward clearer and more sustainable management.

step1.title: Assess Current State and Readiness
step1.description: Start by analyzing current policies, documents, and controls to understand the maturity level of governance, risk, and compliance within your organization.

step2.title: Analyze Gaps and Risks
step2.description: Rasheed compares current practices with relevant frameworks and standards to identify gaps, risks, and improvement opportunities.

step3.title: Manage Actions and Improvements
step3.description: Track remediation actions, policy updates, and control improvements to enhance governance maturity, reduce risks, and strengthen compliance.

step4.title: Continuous Monitoring and Decisions
step4.description: Review indicators and reports that help specialists and management monitor performance and make decisions based on clearer insights.

cta.title: Start managing GRC with greater clarity
cta.description: Use Rasheed to organize governance, risk, and compliance activities while connecting policies, controls, and reports in one workspace.

hero.title: Frequently asked questions
hero.description: If your question isn't answered here, reach out and we'll walk you through it directly.

q1.question: Does Rasheed replace our compliance team?
q1.answer: No. The platform is built as an assistant, not a replacement — it drafts, analyzes, and organizes work, but a qualified person on your team always reviews and approves anything consequential, like a policy publication or a risk acceptance.

q2.question: Where does the AI get its answers from?
q2.answer: Every answer is grounded in your own uploaded documents and the compliance framework text — never a general-purpose guess. If the platform doesn't have enough evidence to answer confidently, it tells you that instead of making something up.

q3.question: Which frameworks are supported?
q3.answer: Both regional and international standards, including NCA ECC, SAMA, and PDPL for Saudi Arabia, and ISO 27001, NIST CSF, CIS Controls, COBIT, and COSO internationally. New frameworks are added as configuration, not custom development.

q4.question: Is our data isolated from other organizations?
q4.answer: Yes. The platform is built multi-tenant from the ground up — every query, document, and AI retrieval is scoped strictly to your organization. Cross-tenant access isn't possible by design.

q5.question: Can we see how an AI-generated answer was produced?
q5.answer: Yes. Every AI-driven answer or recommendation is traceable back to the source documents and framework references it used, along with who approved any resulting action and when — built for external audit review.

q6.question: How do we get started?
q6.answer: Sign in, upload a policy or piece of evidence, and select the frameworks you're measured against. Coverage, gaps, and grounded answers are available within minutes.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.description: Sign in to explore a demo workspace, or reach out to talk through your specific frameworks and requirements.

hero.title: Clear reports to support governance and compliance decisions
hero.description: Transform governance, risk, and compliance data into structured reports that help monitor compliance status, identify gaps, support reviews, and enable better decision-making.

hero.title: Why Rasheed?
hero.subtitle: A clearer way to manage Governance, Risk, and Compliance
hero.description: Rasheed brings policies, controls, risks, and evidence together into one unified workspace, helping organizations understand their compliance position, prioritize actions, and make decisions based on clearer insights.

organizing.title: Organizing Governance and Compliance Operations
organizing.description: Rasheed helps transform policies, requirements, and compliance-related tasks into trackable workflows with clear ownership, status visibility, and progress stages.

analysis.title: Reference-Based Analysis
analysis.description: Rasheed analyzes organizational documents and relevant frameworks while linking insights back to their sources to support review and verification activities.

expertise.title: Expertise Drives Decisions
expertise.description: Rasheed supports professionals with analysis, organization, and recommendations while keeping final review and critical decisions in the hands of qualified experts.

cta.title: Move from tracking compliance to managing it with clarity
cta.description: Discover how Rasheed helps your organization connect policies, risks, controls, and requirements within one unified system supporting governance and compliance activities.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: For inquiries and requests, you can contact the Rasheed team through the channels below.

cta.title: Have a question about Rasheed?
cta.description: We welcome your inquiries and feedback. Our specialized team will get back to you.

hero.title: Everything your compliance team needs in one workspace

policiesPage.title: Policies
policiesPage.description: Author policies, map them to controls, and move them through review to publication. Publishing is a human-gated action restricted to owners, admins, and compliance managers.

policyIntelligencePage.title: Policy Intelligence
policyIntelligencePage.description: Deterministic, evidence-backed scans of regulatory obligations against your policies — coverage gaps and per-policy quality findings, always with a source citation. Read-only: nothing here drafts or changes a policy.

evidencePage.title: Evidence
evidencePage.description: Collect and manage the artifacts that prove your controls are operating — tagged, version-controlled, and linked back to the controls they support.

riskRegisterPage.title: Risk Register
riskRegisterPage.description: Identify, score, and track risks on a 5×5 matrix — with mitigating controls, residual scoring, and ownership. Accepting a risk is a human-gated decision.
